faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.q1: What is the typical import timeline?
faq.a1: From China: 20–30 days (sea) or 7–10 days (air). From Dubai: 3–7 days.
faq.a2: Yes, we provide quality assurance and inspect all products before shipping. We also help resolve any issues that may arise.
faq.q3: What is the minimum order quantity?
faq.a3: We work with all quantities, from small orders (from 5 units) to large shipments.
faq.a4: We offer several secure and flexible payment methods. We will discuss details when you contact us.
faq.q5: Do you help with customs procedures?
faq.a5: Yes, we provide all required documentation and help simplify customs procedures.

landing.heroSubtitle: Import e-commerce products from China and Dubai to Algeria with fast and reliable service, plus trusted supplier sourcing.
landing.servicesSubtitle: Fast and reliable import and delivery solutions from China and Dubai to Algeria
landing.service1Desc: Import e-commerce products from China with complete follow-up until delivery.
landing.service2Desc: Delivery from Dubai in only 48h to Algeria through fast and reliable shipping.
landing.service3Desc: Find trusted suppliers and secure the best prices based on your request.
landing.faqSubtitle: Everything you need to know about importing with Watinex
landing.faqQ1: What are your shipping times from China?
landing.faqA1: We offer both sea freight (20-30 days) and air freight (5-7 days) from China to Algeria. Express options available for urgent shipments with guaranteed delivery times.
landing.faqA2: Yes! We provide full customs clearance services in Algeria. Our team handles all documentation, duties, and taxes, ensuring smooth import process for your goods.
landing.faqA3: We handle a wide range of products including electronics, clothing, accessories, and general merchandise. Some restricted items require special permits - contact us for specific product inquiries.
landing.faqQ4: How do I track my shipment?
landing.faqA4: All shipments include real-time tracking. You'll receive tracking numbers via WhatsApp and can monitor your goods from origin to destination through our tracking system.
landing.faqA5: We offer flexible payment options including bank transfer and mobile payments. Deposit required for first-time clients, with credit terms available for established partnerships.
landing.ctaSubtitle: Contact us now for fast and reliable importing from China and Dubai to Algeria
